title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: MoonShot AI released Kimi K2.6, an LLM optimized for coding tasks and long-running agent swarm applications. The model represents maturation in Chinese AI labs' capability to produce comprehensive and stable large language models.
